title: USDA ARS Long-Term Agroecosystem Research (LTAR) Common Experiment
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"6is9u","text":"A component of the USDA ARS Long-Term Agroecosystem Research (LTAR) network is a Common Experiment standardized across all sites. This collection contains all standardized protocols for the biophysical metrics collected in the Common Experiment.
